description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly gray exterior. The structure is composed of several interlocking rectangular volumes, some of which have skylights or large windows. The front of the house is landscaped with trees and shrubs, and there is a wide driveway leading to a double garage. At the rear, a wooden deck extends out to a rectangular swimming pool, partially shaded by a large tree. The house includes multiple outdoor living spaces, such as a covered patio with a pergola and a poolside area. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open, functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, cubic house with a flat roof, gray exterior, large windows, and a rear deck with a pool. The design features clean lines, landscaped front, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, double garage, and landscaped area with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the interlocking cubic volumes, skylights, and the transition to the backyard with a pool and deck.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the wooden deck, large tree, swimming pool, and covered patio area with pergola.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the garage, additional landscaping, and the connection between the house and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and skylights
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, wide steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway.
